channel.title: Urban Gardening Daily
channel.description: Fresh takes for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.

item.title: The quiet upgrade: small tweaks in composting with outsized returns
item.description: No purchases, no overhauls — the modest composting adjustments that apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners report mattering most.

item.title: Myth vs. reality: small space vegetables
item.description: The persistent myths around small space vegetables, stress-tested against what apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners actually report.

item.title: A weekend project: level up your containers in two hours
item.description: One contained, satisfying containers project for apartment dwellers — start Saturday morning, done by lunch.

item.title: Community pulse: what r/vegetablegardening is debating this week
item.description: The arguments, consensus shifts, and quietly useful threads from the seasonal community this week.

item.title: The composting checklist: run this before you spend
item.description: Seven questions that separate a justified composting purchase from an expensive mood.

item.title: Five mistakes everyone makes in their first month of herbs
item.description: The most common early stumbles in herbs, and the cheap corrections that fix them for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.

item.title: "indoor herb garden" in practice: a real-world field test
item.description: We put the most-repeated advice about indoor herb garden through a month of actual use. Some of it survived.

item.title: The state of Containers in 2026
item.description: A field report on containers: where things stand, and what apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners should do next.

item.title: Starter guide: Herbs without the overwhelm
item.description: A practical on-ramp to herbs for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners — one repeatable workflow, no gear debt.

item.title: "balcony garden ideas" — separating signal from noise
item.description: Thousands of people search "balcony garden ideas" every month. Most of what they find is recycled. Here is what holds up.

item.title: Why apartment dwellers are rethinking Composting
item.description: A quiet shift is underway in how apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners approach composting — less maximalism, more maintenance.

item.title: Seasonal on a budget: what actually matters
item.description: Where money changes outcomes in seasonal — and the line items that are pure vanity.

item.title: What to watch next in Herbs: five quiet shifts
item.description: Ignore the headlines — these are the slower currents reshaping herbs for apartment dwellers and balcony gardeners.
